name: openeye
description: Persistent memory + visual session tracking + RL trajectory capture for AR/XR/mobile procedure verification. FTS5 search across past agent sessions and frame descriptions. Bring your own vision model.

anthropicApiKey.description: Anthropic API key for the agent. Required because the default OpenEye agent uses Claude. Swap providers via src/models.ts if you want a different one.

openeyeContextOptin.description: Opt in to share trajectory data with Context's training pipeline. Default off. Loud opt-in by design — read docs/context-data.md before flipping this.

openeyeContextApiKey.description: Context API key. Only needed if openeyeContextOptin is true.

tools.name: search_memory
tools.description: FTS5 search across all past agent sessions for this tenant. Use to recall what the agent observed in previous procedure runs.

tools.name: search_frames
tools.description: FTS5 search across all past frame scene descriptions. Use to find similar visual situations from prior sessions.

tools.name: recall_skill
tools.description: Retrieve relevant procedural skill documents for the current task. Ranked by keyword or embeddings via OPENEYE_SKILL_RANKER.

tools.name: write_skill
tools.description: Persist a new skill document after completing a complex task. Future sessions will recall this via recall_skill.

tools.name: start_visual_session
tools.description: Begin a tracked AR/XR session. Returns a visual_session_id used to scope subsequent log_frame / verify_step calls.

tools.name: end_visual_session
tools.description: Close a visual session with a status. Triggers reward computation if step verifications were recorded.

tools.name: log_frame
tools.description: Record a frame's natural-language scene description for the current visual session. Indexed for search_frames.

tools.name: verify_step
tools.description: Record a step verification result: pass, fail, or uncertain. Drives the trajectory reward signal: (passes + 0.5 * uncertain) / total.
